# Project Architecture Reference

## Index Structure
- Each workspace project has an architecture blueprint
- Blueprints cover: tech stack, folder structure, and architecture decisions
- Generated via architecture-blueprint-generator skill

## Key Files
- `docs/Project_Architecture/` — all architecture docs
- `docs_architecture.md` — system architecture overview
- `docs_techstack.md` — technology decisions
- `docs_folders.md` — directory structure
